items.name_cn:
『Balenciaga lique』
Hourglass Crocodile Black with Gold Buckle Small
Balenciaga's seasonal heavyweight Hourglass crocodile bag features a unique, iconic curved silhouette that stands out instantly. The smooth surface forms a crescent shape with a metal B-shaped pull ring. The calfskin texture is exquisite and full of character! Go for it, don't stop!! 🖤🖤🖤
Small size: 19x8x21cm

items.name_en: New Wax Leather Shoulder Bag🎉 Double Buckle Soft Lux🎉🎉 This leather handbag features a simple and exquisite design, with a glossy finish that exudes a classical atmosphere. It showcases a modern casual attitude, and the long handle is convenient for shoulder carrying. Leather pocket on the back, enamel triangle metal, magnetic snap closure. Large capacity. Extremely useful 👏 Absolutely a must-have for fashionistas, get yours now!

items.name_en: 💝💝Genuine Leather💝💝 M23640 Black M23698 White This OnTheGo East West bag introduces the OnTheGo small tote design, reinterpreting the East West ample silhouette with Monogram Empreinte leather. Giant Monogram is embossed on the leather body, and the tidy interior can hold daily essentials. Top handle and detachable leather chain shoulder strap allow for various carrying ways. Dimensions: 25 x 13 x 10cm

⭐️【ALMA BB Handbag】🚩 M59793 Beige🚩(Embroidered)
This Alma BB handbag embodies the essence of the 1930s Art Deco style, featuring a full-bodied quilted calfskin embroidered Monogram pattern, paired with embossed leather handles and a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap for versatile carrying.
Dimensions: 24.5 x 18 x 12 cm

items.name_en: Factory-grade Small Dior Jolie Bucket Bag "White"
items.name_cn:
Factory-grade Small Dior Jolie Bucket Bag "White"
This Dior Jolie Bucket Bag is a new arrival from the 2024 Fall/Winter Collection, showcasing a fashionable look. Crafted from black calfskin, it features a large Monogram quilting and a drawstring closure with a spacious interior. The small size is stylish and modern, designed with a detachable black leather top handle, and a detachable adjustable chain shoulder strap made of vintage gold-finish metal CD links accented with resin beads, allowing for hand, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Drawstring closure
Interior slip pocket
Detachable leather top handle
Vintage gold-finish metal CD link chain with resin beads and adjustable leather strap
Dimensions: 17 x 16 x 9 cm (L x H x W)
